# SavingsClub

> Free personal finance calculators and educational money guides for Americans in every state. Helping you keep more of what you earn.

SavingsClub publishes free, ad-light financial calculators and plain-English guides. Every calculator shows its working, uses verified current-year tax and rate data, and states its assumptions. Content is educational only and is not financial advice. SavingsClub is not a licensed financial advisor.

## Calculators

- [Budget Planner](https://savingsclub.com/budget-planner/): 50/30/20 budget calculator that compares your real spending against target and flags categories that run over.
- [Emergency Fund Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/emergency-fund-calculator/): Personalized target based on household and job risk, plus a job-loss runway model that accounts for state unemployment benefits.
- [Investment Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/investment-calculator/): Portfolio growth with contributions, the true cost of fund fees, value in today's dollars, and a retirement drawdown model.
- [CD Interest Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/cd-calculator/): Certificate of deposit interest, effective APY, term comparison, and early withdrawal cost.
- [Paycheck Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/paycheck-calculator/): Federal take-home pay, with state-specific versions for Texas, Florida, Illinois, Michigan, and North Carolina.
- [401(k) Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/401k-calculator/): Employer match, contribution limits, and balance by age.
- [Roth IRA Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/roth-ira-calculator/): Tax-free growth projection and contribution limits.
- [Retirement Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/retirement-calculator/): Retirement readiness and income projection.
- [Savings Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/savings-calculator/): Compound growth on regular savings.
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/compound-interest-calculator/): The underlying compounding engine, shown simply.
- [Debt Payoff Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/debt-payoff-calculator/): Debt-free date and interest saved from extra payments.
- [Credit Card Payoff Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/credit-card-payoff-calculator/): True cost of carrying a balance.
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/mortgage-calculator/): Monthly payment, with state-specific versions.
- [Auto Loan Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/auto-loan-calculator/): Car payment and total interest.
- [Net Worth Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/net-worth-calculator/): Assets minus liabilities.
- [Inflation Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/inflation-calculator/): Purchasing power over time.
- [Loan Payoff Calculator](https://savingsclub.com/loan-payoff-calculator/): Any fixed-rate loan.

## Free downloads

- [Free Personal Budget Template](https://savingsclub.com/free-budget-template/): Budget planner in Excel, Google Sheets, and printable PDF. No email or payment required.

## Guides

- [Emergency Fund Guide](https://savingsclub.com/emergency-fund/): How much you need, where to keep it, and how to build it.
- [Blog](https://savingsclub.com/blog/): Practical money guides on budgeting, saving, credit, debt, and retirement.
- [Banking](https://savingsclub.com/banking/): High-yield savings and account comparisons.
- [Credit Cards](https://savingsclub.com/credit-cards/): Card comparisons and guidance.
